posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

I feel like this should be straight forward, but I am just running into a weird issue. My current board creates a Jira ticket automatically when an item is created. It is able to sync difference fields likes assignee and priority. The problem I am having is that I am trying to get the JIRA URL to be transferred back to Monday; preferably into a link column. When given the option to fill in “these fields” in the integration, it even has a URL option in the pull down menu for JIra which I have flow from Jira to Monday to the link column. It feels like that is how it should work, but it doesn’t.

What am I missing?

posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Figured it out
I needed to use “Link to Issue” instead of URL
